subtitle: Enterprise Architecture Leader -- GenAI Governance | API Governance | Regulated Industry Depth
summary_text: Senior technology leader who owned enterprise architecture decisions for a 35+ person IT organization across 14 years as the first CTO at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny (50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays). Led cloud-first transformation, contact center modernization, and the production ML deployment that brought the organization into AI-ready data architecture. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm. Architecture-as-function discipline (governance, integration patterns, standards-setting) is the through-line.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, compliance, and capability-fit dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned enterprise architecture decisions across cloud migration, ERP/CRM platform evolution, contact center modernization, data platform maturation, and security posture for 14 years -- architecture-as-function rather than architect-as-title.

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance with zero compliance findings attributable to migration.

Led full contact center / communications platform transformation -- multi-channel integration, AI-assisted routing and coaching, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Directed BI and analytics maturation including production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions -- first production AI in the organization's history under regulatory governance.

Owned multi-year roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM platform for 8 years, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) governed sprint-over-sprint decisions.
Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across IT, software development, infrastructure, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.

Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade content management platform supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, deployment, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise Architecture Governance, API Governance, Standards & Patterns, Multi-Platform Integration, AI/ML Guardrails
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, DataRobot (Production ML), Claude API
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Cloud Migration
Data Warehousing, Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, Data Governance
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap
